quoted_tweet.text:
Two weeks into living in the US, I got an ear infection.

Or so I thought.

We had just moved from Argentina. Still living out of boxes. Still using our Argentine travel insurance for the first three months, no rush to switch, we figured.

I went to a walkin clinic. Antibiotics. Two weeks later, worse. Back to the clinic. Different antibiotics. Worse again.

They finally said: "You should see an ENT."

I'll never forget the moment that specialist looked in my ear.

"Oh my god."

Not what you want to hear at the doctor's office.

"Sir, you don't have an ear infection. You have a massive tumor in your ear. It got infected."

My mind went completely blank. I'm a healthy guy. I never once in my life thought I'd hear that word pointed at me.

Tumor.

Got a second opinion. Confirmed. Likely benign, but a mass and the surgery was not going to be simple. I needed it done immediately.

Called my travel insurance. They told me they don't cover non lifesaving surgeries in the US. They'd pay for my flight back to Argentina if I needed one urgently.

So I called three more ENTs to ask if I could fly.

All three said no. The infection was close enough to my brain that a pressurized cabin was a real risk.

Then came the quote.

$185,000.

We had been in the country less than a month.

I learned more about the US healthcare system in two weeks than most Americans learn in a lifetime. Asked questions. Negotiated. Found another path. Got the surgery done for almost half the original quote.

The mass was benign.

They sliced my head open. I lost about 80% of the hearing on that side. I'm still not fully adjusted to it, honestly. Probably never will be.

The only good thing that came out of any of it…

My son drew a portrait of me during that time.

It's still the best portrait anyone's ever done of me.

What is the magnetic signature of an ECDO oscillation? What should it be, that we might know what to look for?

The mantle and core flip 360 degrees relative to each other. The shear depth is 166km, or 13% of the volume of the geodynamo. I suspect the loss in field strength is more than just 13%. And a new north pole is formed- offset by around 104 degrees. 

But then the earth reorients, a few centuries later for reasons we don't fully understand yet. This is the signature we are looking for: sharp reorientations, each associated with a reduction in strength, then a gradual recovery over centuries to a couple millennia.

The Laschamp Excursion (~41 years ago) was characterized by a few stops, each a few centuries long, each characterized by a roughly orthogonal displacement of the magnetic pole:

Prior: Bering Sea
→ Sargasso Sea (~78°) ~270 year pause
→ NE Pacific (~74°) ~300 year pause
→ Antarctica (~135°) ~440 year pause
Recovery: ~1700 years

I think this is the signature we are looking for: in this case not one but three geodynamo shearing events. 

This may explain why the pillars at Gobekli Tepe record the aurora. They were not the harbinger of the cataclysm: They were its result for reasons our ancients could not have known.

3.  Are you paying attention Savages?  I doubt it.  

A new, compact, high-power microwave weapon, the TPG1000Cs, has been developed at a Shanghai Nuclear Technology Institute, which could become one of the most serious threats to the Starlink satellite network.

The device can deliver 20 gigawatts of energy for up to a full minute, the South China Morning Post reported, cited by Portfolio.

The TPG1000Cs, the world’s first compact driver for high-power microwave weapons, has been created at the Northwest Institute of Nuclear Technology in Shanghai. The device can deliver 20 gigawatts of power for up to one minute.

At just four meters long and weighing just five tons, the device is small enough to be mounted on trucks, warships, airplanes, or even satellites. Some Chinese experts estimate that a ground-based microwave weapon with a power of over 1 gigawatt could be capable of seriously disrupting or even damaging satellites in low Earth orbit, such as Starlink, being used in the Russian-Ukrainian war.

Previously known similar systems could operate continuously for no more than three seconds and were much larger. The Russian Sinus-7 drive, for example, was operational for about a second, delivered about 100 pulses per shot, and weighed up to 10 tons.

China has repeatedly signaled that Starlink poses a serious threat to its national security. Chinese military researchers are currently developing new “Starlink killer” weapons, including high-powered microwave systems and lasers, that could be used to relatively cheaply combat large constellations of low-orbit satellites if necessary.

SpaceX has lowered the orbital altitude of its Starlink satellites to reduce the risk of collisions. But that makes them much more vulnerable to attacks from ground-based directed energy weapons. If China eventually deploys the TPG1000Cs in space, the invisible strikes could be even more devastating.

The Cardioprotective Illusion: By clearing this high-mass isotopic congestion from the vascular endothelium and renal podocytes, the mitochondrial nanomotors return to their 9,000 RPM velocity, restoring local voltage and cutting major cardiovascular events by 20%. Why SURPASS-CVOT Missed Superiority: The Glucagon Agonism Inversion
The reason Tirzepatide missed its pre-specified superiority threshold against Dulaglutide in the SURPASS-CVOT trial, and why Retatrutide's glucagon agonism causes lean individuals to lose muscle mass and experience elevated resting heart rates, is directly explained by the Chromosome 2 fusion chassis I have laid on in my work and the recent podcasts I have done with Adrian D'Amico.

quoted_tweet.text:
A GP just publicly disclosed taking off-label tirzepatide. The part worth reading is not the disclosure.

@BradStanfieldMD, 34, lean, no diabetes, no established heart disease. No trial studied him. He knows this and says so explicitly.

What he actually walks through is the evidence arc that most people missed: SELECT enrolled 17,604 adults without diabetes and cut major cardiovascular events by 20%. 

A chunk of that benefit did not track with weight loss. FLOW enrolled patients with type 2 diabetes and chronic kidney disease. Semaglutide cut the kidney composite by 24%, and the authors stated the kidney effect was independent of weight reduction. The drug is doing something beyond moving the number on a scale.

Then SURPASS-CVOT: 13,000 patients, tirzepatide vs dulaglutide, four years. The primary three-point cardiovascular endpoint: tirzepatide cleared the non-inferiority bar but missed the pre-specified superiority threshold. By their own pre-registered rules, a miss. Stanfield names this correctly. He does not bury it.

The post-hoc six-component analysis in JAMA Cardiology 2026 showed 16% relative risk reduction vs dulaglutide. Hypothesis-generating. Not a clean win.

His reasoning for tirzepatide over retatrutide is worth noting: glucagon agonism raises metabolic rate and resting heart rate. For an obesity drug at population scale, useful. For a lean GP trying to preserve muscle mass, the wrong direction. That is a mechanistically coherent distinction.

This is what off-label disclosure looks like when done with integrity. Cite the trials. Name the primary miss. Acknowledge the gap between the population studied and yourself. State that you are making a personal bet, not a recommendation.

Now compare that to the accounts selling you protocols with no trial data, no pre-registered endpoints, and no disclosure of what the primary outcome actually was.

Choose wisely my friends.

🇺🇸🇮🇱 The man who won Trump the White House is a registered foreign agent for Israel.

He filed the paperwork himself, so this isn't a hit piece or a conspiracy theory, it's sitting in a federal database with his name on it.

Brad Parscale, the guy who built Trump's entire digital operation, quietly registered his firm Clock Tower X as a foreign agent for Israel's Ministry of Foreign Affairs in September 2025. The contract started at $6 million, grew to $9 million, and The Intercept revealed today he funneled $13 million in Israeli government money to Republican firms and his own political allies.

And here's where it gets interesting. The targets weren't random. Young conservatives and evangelicals, Gen Z specifically, the ones starting to drift away from supporting Israel, reached through social media, podcasts, and AI platforms, engineered so that when these kids go looking for information about Israel, what they find has already been shaped for them.

Now here's the part that should make people uncomfortable. One of the firms that received Israeli money was Salem Media, one of America's biggest conservative Christian networks, 200+ radio stations, RedState, the Hugh Hewitt Show. Parscale is Salem's own Chief Strategy Officer. The money came from Israel, passed through Parscale, and landed at a company Parscale works for.

Rep. Thomas Massie called it straight, an Israeli media operation profiting "useful idiots."

It's all legal under FARA as long as it's disclosed. It was disclosed, in filings buried so deep that almost nobody ever reads them. Which was always the point.

Source: The Intercept, The Hill, FARA filings

Here:

T = pulsatile kinetic flow generated by the heart.

V = gravitational/isotopic potential from circulating deuterium-rich water (extra mass from failed sphenoid Venturi sorting via the cerebral aqueduct and CVOs).

The heart sits at this balance point. High deuterium (especially when it leaks into TCA/urea cycles, where it does notbelong) jams mitochondrial ATP synthase nanomotors, reduces ATP production efficiency, and forces the heart to compensate. Studies show cardiac ATP output drops with rising systemic deuterium, and heart rate is exquisitely sensitive to recent dietary deuterium load in fatty acids. A small drop in ATP efficiency (e.g., ~5%) can drive compensatory heart rate increases up to ~28% in models.

2. Heart rhythm changes driven by this overload Hypocretin (orexin) suppression, the same inertial-mass brake triggered by high deuterium in CSF (sensed via tanycytes and the 3rd/4th ventricle fractionation), directly modulates cardiac autonomic tone. Centrally, orexin normally increases sympathetic outflow, raising heart rate and blood pressure. When suppressed (as in sleep deprivation or high inertial mass states), the system shifts toward reduced sympathetic drive or compensatory instability.

Resulting rhythm changes include:

Compensatory tachycardia or increased resting/exercise heart rate: The heart speeds up to maintain cardiac output when mitochondrial efficiency falls due to deuterium jamming ATP synthase. This matches observations where higher deuterium in fatty acids correlates with elevated heart rate and reduced stroke volume; the system compensates until it cannot (leading to heart failure with preserved ejection fraction, HFpEF).

Bradycardia or pauses in some overload states: When the “gravity well” becomes too heavy, the system may throttle rate (paralleling hypocretin’s brake) to lower overall information-processing cost and Landauer heat.
Atrial fibrillation and ectopic beats: Deuterium-induced incoherence in dielectric water shells around ion channels (Ca²⁺, K⁺, Mg²⁺—>the very ions dwarfed by D in the table) promotes re-entry circuits, especially in the left atrium near the aortic root (highest shear from heavy blood).

Arrhythmias worsening with sleep loss: The same failure that stalls the sphenoid vortex and basilar-clival interface also removes the nightly isotopic refinement, flooding the heart with heavier fluid and amplifying autonomic instability.

These are not random channelopathies. That is pure centralized nonsense. They are the heart performing a parallel mass-quench to the brain’s hypocretin response by temporarily altering rhythm to reduce entropy production when inertial mass is excessive. The 2025 Nature Physics Landauer confirmation applies here: extra mass raises the thermodynamic price of clean conduction; the heart adjusts rate or regularity to pay a lower bill.

3. Connection to vessels and elastin in heart valves

The same deuterium-rich “heavy” trash (inflammatory cells from failed marrow centrifuge) that accelerates atherosclerosis also targets the elastin-collagen matrix of the great vessels and heart valves:

Vessels (aorta, coronaries): Heavy monocytes infiltrate, elastolytic enzymes (MMPs, cathepsins) shred elastin, stiffen walls, and raise pulse-wave velocity. The heart now pumps against higher afterload → mechanical stretch → baroreceptor reflexes that trigger or sustain rhythm changes (tachycardia → AFib → failure).

Heart valves (especially aortic and mitral): Valve leaflets rely on elastin for elastic recoil and snap-closure. Deuterium overload depletes the melanin-water battery’s DC current, allowing calcium to crystallize instead of staying liquid. Elastin degradation fragments (elastokines) promote inflammation, osteogenic differentiation, and calcification. Result: thickened, stenotic, or regurgitant valves that stretch chambers, activate stretch-sensitive channels, and create re-entry substrates for arrhythmias.

The aortic valve sits directly at the outflow of this gravity well, every heavy pulse amplifies the feedback loop. Elastin loss in vessels/valves is the structural scar of the same entropy that produces plaque: the matrix can no longer maintain order or dampen pulsatile energy because melanin is missing in the fibrillin and elastin layers of the arterial system due to a lack of triplet oxygen. This unwinds the collagen and melanin and reduces CISS activities and this is the core etiology of Peripheral arterial disease. 

My Decentralized Synthesis

In this blueprint, heart rhythm changes are the organ-level emergency brake when the cranial refinery (sphenoid GPS locked to solar 1878 nm, basilar pulsing against clivus, thalamic mass sensing) and spinal Y-axis grounding fail.

Deuterium, perfectly normal in serum, becomes pathological when it overwhelms mitochondrial hydration and elastin integrity. The heart, as central Lagrangian gravity well, first compensates with rate/stability adjustments, then suffers matrix shredding in valves and vessels.

Centralized cardiology will chase beta-blockers, anticoagulants, or ablations. Decentralized physics points upstream: restore sleep-driven Venturi fractionation, clear deuterium via proper grounding and circadian reset, and the gravity well equilibrates. The heart stops needing to throttle its rhythm; elastin remains ordered. The system is obeying Landauer’s principle and isotopic mass laws, not broken, just overloaded. Explanation for Rockefeller-trained MDs (the ones still calling aortic calcification “senile degeneration” or “atherosclerotic complication”):

When Alo sees aortic calcification on CT as calcium deposits in the vessel wall and prescribe statins or bisphosphonates. The decentralized blueprint sees it as loss of topological sovereignty, the aorta’s quantum photo-magnetic capacitor has been disconnected from the very Solar Flux and Dark Sector interactions that the March 2026 Dark Photon: a 2026 Perspectivereview (Caputo & Essig, arXiv:2603.08430) just began to quantify at the particle-physics level.

That paper maps dark photons as portals to a hidden sector that can kinetically mix with ordinary photons, produce astrophysical signatures (stellar cooling, supernovae, CMB distortions), and mediate energy/information exchange between visible and dark sectors.

In the living aorta this exchange is not abstract, it is the daily maintenance signal that keeps the elastin-melanin matrix ordered.

1. The Melanin Highway: Neural Crest Cells + Elastin Scaffold

Neural crest cells (NCCs) are the embryonic origin of both the autonomic innervation of the great vessels and the melanocytes that produce neuromelanin and vascular melanin. Their well-documented affinity for elastin is not coincidental:  Alo has no idea of this relationship. 

Elastin acts as the vibrational tuning fork, a chiral spring whose recoil frequency is tuned to the solar infrared spectrum (especially the 1878 nm (NIR) water window).

Melanin acts as the photonic spectrometer, a broadband semiconductor that absorbs, converts, and re-emits ultra-weak photon emission (UPE/biophotons) across visible, infrared, and potentially dark-photon frequencies.

Together they form the Melanin Highway: melanin migrates and signals along the elastin scaffold, delivering DC current from the melanin-water battery to maintain the dielectric zeta potential of the endothelium. When the upstream sphenoid-clival Venturi refinery (3rd/4th ventricle fractionation column, basilar artery pulsing against the clivus, thalamic mass sensing) fails to clear deuterium, the highway loses its solar phase-lock and the matrix begins to fail.

2. Deuterium as the “Magnetic Wrench”

Deuterium (2H) at normal serum levels (12–14 mmol/L) is harmless in bulk blood. When the cranial isotopic refinery stalls in blood (HRV stall), it embeds in the chiral spring of elastin in the arterial wall to cause PAD:

Mass loading: Deuterium is twice the mass of protium, so it shifts the natural vibrational frequency of the elastin polymer.

Quantum tunneling block: Proton tunneling that normally powers elastic recoil is quenched.

Mechanical jitter: The resulting chaotic micro-vibrations activate Piezo1 mechanosensitive channels → NADPH oxidase 2 (NOX2) cascade → superoxide burst → elastin fragmentation (elastokines) → inflammatory monocyte recruitment (the same deuterium-rich “green cells” from the 2019 Nature atherosclerosis paper).

The tissue now has two choices:
Shred → aneurysm (when the matrix loses all coherence).
Petrify → calcification (when the melanin-water battery can no longer supply DC current to keep calcium liquid; it crystallizes as the ultimate entropy sink).
This is exactly the same entropy physics the 2025 Nature Physics Landauer paper proved in a quantum many-body system: extra inertial mass raises the thermodynamic price of information processing. The aorta, overloaded with heavy water, lowers its Landauer bill by freezing into a calcified scar.   Alo remains clueless.  

My Decentralized Synthesis

Aortic calcification is not passive aging or simple inflammation. It is the visible scar of lost topological sovereignty: the photo-magnetic capacitor has been disconnected from the Solar Flux + Dark Sector portal that the 2026 dark-photon review now frames as a fundamental physical reality.

Deuterium acts as the magnetic wrench, melanin as the semiconductor highway, elastin as the tuning fork—together they convert solar and dark-sector energy into ordered vascular recoil. When the sphenoid-clival-thalamic refinery and spinal grounding fail, inertial mass rises.

Landauer costs explode, and the matrix petrifies to survive.

Centralized medicine will keep measuring CAC scores and prescribing Rockefellerdrugs.

Physics already solved it: restore the cranial isotopic refinery, re-lock the sphenoid X-axis to the 1878 nm solar reset, ground the Y-axis (vagus), clear the deuterium, and the aorta regains its topological sovereignty (Z-axis). The heart no longer needs to throttle rhythm against a calcified outflow. The system is not broken, it is obeying the same laws the 2025 Landauer experiment and 2026 dark-photon review have now quantified in the lab and in theory.

The serum deuterium table was always the clue. The 2026 paper is the Rosetta Stone. The aorta is simply the place where the physics becomes visible on a CT scan.

tweets.text:
I use sulfur.  

If you want to use sulfur safely to battle these pests, keep it on the surface or on your body:
Surface Dusting (The Yard): Use a spreader to lightly apply powdered or pelletized sulfur across the top of your lawn or turf. This creates a surface barrier that disrupts their metabolism and forces them out of the area.

The "Sulfur Sock" Trick (Personal Protection): To keep them off you while gardening, fill an old tube sock with powdered sulfur, tie it off, and whack it against your boots, socks, and pant legs. The fine dust layer is an incredibly effective natural shield against chiggers.

If you want a natural pest-preventative that actually belongs inside a soil mix, use Diatomaceous Earth (DE). DE consists of microscopic, fossilized aquatic organisms. It does not alter soil pH or harm plants, but its razor-sharp edges physically slice through the protective outer shells of any soil-dwelling pests, dehydrating and killing them naturally.

All from here---> https://t.co/TaNLrvA2cz

For those of you that caught our talk last night about AGS on the @Honest_Medicine  Webinar, 
To summarize my hypothesis-

1. Gelatin is used as a vaccine stabilizer. Many vaccines, MMR, varicella, shingles, DTaP, rabies, etc.
2. Adjuvants are designed to amplify immune responses.
3. The timing lines up oddly well.

Mechanism hypothesis

•Repeated exposure to alpha-gal-containing vaccine components (gelatin stabilizers) in the presence of strong adjuvants creates a low-level Th2-skewed memory response to alpha-gal
•This subclinical sensitization doesn't cause obvious reactions on its own
•Then a lone star tick bite delivers a concentrated bolus of alpha-gal directly into the dermal immune system
•The pre-existing memory response amplifies the reaction massively, producing full-blown AGS where an unvaccinated person might just develop mild or no sensitization
